## Runtime.Session.EditingSession.saveAsNewRecipe() method

Saves as an entirely new recipe with new ID. Use when collection is immutable or creating a derivative recipe.

**Signature:**

```typescript
saveAsNewRecipe(options: ISaveNewRecipeOptions): Result<ISaveResult>;
```
